evals.prompt: Run /implement for JIRA-123. The plan file already exists in /analysis/.
evals.expected_output: Agent loads plan-JIRA-123.md, runs pre_scripts, git sync, Jira to In Dev + bot-cx-ai-dev, branch, code, tests, post_scripts; leaves changes unstaged; does not commit or open PR.

evals.prompt: Implement the Story JIRA-123 following the plan in analysis/plan-JIRA-123.md.
evals.expected_output: Agent follows implement-workflow mandatory sequence, respects Phase column /implement only, stops before git add/commit/push.
